notes: Seti Astro Suite Pro V1.14.7 Major updates to WIMS, including full year analysis for targets, finder chart integration, and more. Major overhaul to Continuum Subtraction. V1.14.6 Major Updates to Blink, including a zoom preview area and weighted scoring in metrics. Major fix to Install and Update AI models to prevent removal of any syqon models in the folder. V1.14.5 Cosmic Clarity Denoise - Walking Noise Denoise Model!!! Various updates to Whats In My Sky, CLI calls, Astrobin Exporter (profiles), and more. Post1 - Update to the Install from Zip button which was deleting the other model files instead of appending the new files.  V1.14.4 Whats In My Sky major update. First Time User Welcome UI. Exoplanet Detector header bug fix. Satellite Trail remover xisf saving header bug fix. V1.14.3 Batch processing in Planetary/Surface Stacker. Updates to Texture/Clarity Tool. Major updates to Exoplanet/Variable Star Transit tool. V1.14.2 Automated Full Stacking Pipeline button and clean up temp files in stacking suite. Comet stacking bug fix. Shortcut alignment tools. FITS table bug fix. Minor other UX fixes. V1.14.1 Added Interactive Flat Strength optimization tool in stacking suite. Adjusted calibration pipeline math. Syqon Prism Live Tile Preview. Surface Magnitude Tool now uses per star FWHM measurement. V1.14.0 Introducing Selective Luma Correction. This is the sister tool to Selective Color Correction, where you can define or select ranges of brightness and manipulate that band. Various bug fixes and UX improvements. Mini Game launch bug fix.
